summary: Iteration 18 - Admin Orders UI MVP & Public Resend Access. All 17 features tested. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working. Fixed frontend error handling for response body stream consumption by emergent script interceptor.
critical_code_review_comments: OrderSuccess.js: Fixed handleResendAccess to handle response body already consumed by emergent script's global fetch interceptor. Now uses try/catch with status code fallback messages.
RedeemCode.js: Removed invalid eslint-disable comment that was causing compilation errors.
AdminOrders.js: Correctly implements resend-email and grant-access buttons with data-testid attributes. Requires admin login for actions to work.
admin_routes.py: GET /api/admin/orders returns paginated list from payment_transactions with search by email/name/order#. Detail endpoint returns transaction, download_links, delivery_logs.
redeem_routes.py: POST /api/orders/resend-access correctly implements rate limiting (3/hour per order+email) using resend_access_requests collection.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing orders SF-2026-CZ5SB, SF-2026-P7DXY, SF-2026-MANUAL-ME01
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Orders UI and Public Resend Access fully tested. Rate limit for SF-2026-CZ5SB is exhausted (3+ requests). Use SF-2026-P7DXY for public resend tests. Admin resend/grant actions require login. The emergent script intercepts fetch and consumes response body on non-ok responses - frontend code must handle this with try/catch.

GET_admin_orders.details: Returns paginated order list from payment_transactions with items, total, page, limit, pages

GET_admin_orders_detail.details: Returns transaction, order, download_links, delivery_logs for order

POST_admin_resend_email.details: Resends order confirmation email with download links. Returns {success: true, message: 'Email resent to ...'}

POST_admin_grant_access.details: Creates download links for order items. Returns {success: true, message: '... download link(s) created', links_created: N}

POST_orders_resend_access_success.details: Public endpoint sends order confirmation email. Returns {success: true, message: 'Access email sent!'}

POST_orders_resend_access_wrong_email.details: Returns 403 with 'Email does not match the order' message

POST_orders_resend_access_rate_limit.details: 4th request in same hour returns 429 with 'Too many requests' message

admin_orders_page_loads.details: /admin/orders shows Order Management header, search input, orders list with 46 orders

admin_orders_search.details: Search filters orders by order number or email

admin_orders_resend_button.details: Mail icon button triggers resend-email API. Shows success toast when logged in.

admin_orders_grant_button.details: Lock icon button triggers grant-access API. Shows success toast when logged in.

order_success_resend_section.details: /order-success?order=X shows 'Resend Access Link' section with email input and Resend button

order_success_resend_works.details: Enter email + click Resend sends email. Shows success or rate limit message.
